mnemonics.title: RISC vs CISC
mnemonics.content: RISC: Reduced Instructions, Simple Cycles | CISC: Complex Instructions, Multiple Cycles

acronyms.usage: Describes architectures with complex, multi-function instructions

visualTips.visualization: Imagine RISC as 5 identical boxes in sequence, CISC as irregular shapes with varying sizes

analogies.analogy: RISC is like bicycle (simple, efficient), CISC is like car (complex, feature-rich)
